consultation.chief_complaint: Chest pain and shortness of breath
consultation.history: Patient reports chest pain that started 2 days ago, associated with shortness of breath on exertion.
consultation.examination: Blood pressure 140/90, heart rate 88 bpm, chest clear, no signs of distress.
consultation.diagnosis: Possible angina, rule out myocardial infarction
consultation.treatment_plan: ECG, blood tests, cardiology referral if needed
consultation.follow_up: Return in 1 week or sooner if symptoms worsen
consultation.referral_reason: Cardiology consultation for chest pain evaluation

mbs_items.description: Professional attendance by a general practitioner
mbs_items.evidence: High confidence match based on consultation type
